# Third-party LanguageTool assets

| Path | Source | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `english-pos-dict/` | Maven `org.languagetool:english-pos-dict:0.6` | Morfologik POS + hunspell speller FSAs for English |
| `opennlp-models/` | Maven `edu.washington.cs.knowitall:opennlp-*-models:1.5` | OpenNLP en-token/pos/chunk binaries (for future full chunker port) |

Fetch scripts: `scripts/fetch-english-dicts.sh`, `scripts/fetch-opennlp-models.sh`.

These are **not** re-licensed by this project; keep upstream licenses.
